rationale: A0 confirms PowerShell importing SharpHound.ps1 from C:\Temp\ under corp\Administrator at High integrity, a well-known BloodHound AD reconnaissance tool. EV-001 confirms the SharpHound.exe binary was subsequently executed with '--CollectionMethod all', enumerating the full Active Directory environment. EV-002 through EV-008 confirm SharpHound successfully completed its collection, producing output files covering groups, GPOs, users, OUs, domains, computers, and a final BloodHound.zip archive — all written to C:\Temp\ — proving the AD enumeration ran to completion. The presence of both the PS1 loader and the standalone EXE, staged in C:\Temp\ and launched via cmd.exe, is consistent with an attacker (or insider threat) conducting pre-lateral-movement AD reconnaissance; no benign explanation accounts for this toolset and output pattern.
